description: Added FAQPage schema (3 Q&As) + answer-first blocks (4/4 H2s) to analyze-health-data-ai/index.html. Citations: Apple Support, HealthKit docs, Statista, Nature npj Digital Medicine 2021. Added visible FAQ section. Updated dateModified to 2026-06-25.

Answers 'analyze Apple Health data with AI', 'HealthKit data types', and 'is it safe to upload health data to AI' queries for AI Overviews and Perplexity.
